prompts.SessionStart: ascending metallic click sequence with crisp ratchet ticking up, gear tooth percussion, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: descending metallic clicks slowing with smooth ratchet wind-down, gear tooth percussion, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single precise metallic click locking into place with ring, gear tooth, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick crisp ratchet tick with brief metallic snap, gear click, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short gear tooth click confirming with precise metallic tap, ratchet sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two metallic clicks with questioning ratchet rhythm, gear tooth, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp

prompts.SubagentStop: clear metallic click returning with brief ratchet settle, gear tooth, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
